response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker — all core to the role — plus direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest. His open-source contributions, architecture versatility, and strong communication through workshops further demonstrate leadership and alignment with the job’s collaborative, process-driven culture.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Vitest
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling experience, including MCP frameworks
Strong open-source contributions and communication skills via workshops and public projects
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles
German language skill is only basic, may impact local team collaboration
Resume lacks detail on relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) usage in recent work
